response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated expertise in open-source project leadership and DevOps infrastructure
Proven ability to work in complex, distributed systems with high-performance requirements
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments as required
Zero indication of Japanese language proficiency or any familiarity with Japanese business culture
No exposure to embedded networking, switch firmware, or security protocols like MACsec/802.1X
